message:
refactor(codegen): Use name_gen for temp variables in dict/set methods

Replace hardcoded __iter, __result, __in_all etc. with unique names
generated by name_gen.temp() to prevent variable collision bugs.

This is part of the consolidation effort to use single sources of
truth for repeated patterns in the codebase.

Files updated:
- dict.zig: genCopy(), genPopitem()
- set.zig: all set operations (copy, union, intersection, difference,
  symmetric_difference, issubset, issuperset, isdisjoint, and their
  update variants)
